subject: OWL ping — Cycle 1 (00:50Z)
body:
Bull — OWL Cycle 1 check at 00:50Z. No new messages from you since my last pings at 00:44Z and 00:45Z, and no new messages since my response at 20:40Z yesterday.

Quick status:
- Fleet: Stable (14 up, 2 down — Contractor Pro & Gym Forge)
- Photo-to-Claim: Phases 1-3 code complete, Phase 4 ready
- Security Audit P0: Standing by for joint planning

All quiet on my end. Waiting for your next message.

— OWL
